1707440.name: The Best BJ - AutoPlay BJ Service Bot
1707440.description:
Tired of making all those tough choices where your first two cards total 15 and the dealer shows an 8?

Want to see how an automated bot would handle that dealer who always seems to get the best of you?

This AutoPlay BJ Service Bot is here to help grind you out of the low balance you might feel stuck in! Watch it play for you, learn it's basic BJ strategies to apply in your own play style later on when you have a higher in game balance!

A few things to note about the AutoPlay BJ Service Bot:

- This bot will always can be turned off or on at any time by simply clicking the button in the lower left corner

- This bot will always bet approximately 5% of your balance, or $1.. whatever is higher

- This bot will NOT record high scores for you on the Steam Leaderboards. If it gets your balance to within 5% of your highest score you've ever posted to the Steam leaderboards, the Autobot will shut off. It cannot be turned on again until your current balance falls lower than 5% lower than your best ever balance. This AutoBot is about giving "YOU" that moment and the thrill of trying to post your best balance after all!

- The bot will always take the Karma options to gain additional money at the cost of karma

- The bot will play endlessly until you turn it off, until you exit the game, or until the AutoBut gets you within 5% of your highest balance you've ever posted to the Steam leaderboards. If you restart the game at a later time, you'll need to simply hit the button to turn it on again should you want the AutoPlay bot to continue playing for you

IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THE BEST BJ AUTOPLAY SERVICE BOT:
Purchasing or using the AutoPlay bot does not guarantee success of any kind in The Best BJ. It will simply try to make the best strategic moves for you given each situation. Luck will always be the biggest determining factor in whether you win or lose money, and the AutoPlay bot doesn't provide any additional "luck" in the game mechanics or code. It is simply a tool for you to use whenever you choose.
